name: Soldier
description: Soldiers are the professional fighting men and women of the Old World's armies, mercenary companies, and militias. They are trained in the use of weapons, armour, and tactics, and are the backbone of the Empire's military might. A career in soldiering demands toughness, discipline, and the willingness to follow orders — even unto death.

name: Road Warden
description: With a wary eye and ready weapon, you tour the highways of the Empire enforcing the law.

name: Witch Hunter
description: You hunt the illegal witches plaguing the Empire by any and all means necessary.
